scripts.checkall: npm run typecheck && npm run check
scripts.native:targets:add: rustup target add x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu x86_64-unknown-linux-musl aarch64-unknown-linux-musl armv7-unknown-linux-gnueabihf armv7-unknown-linux-musleabihf x86_64-apple-darwin aarch64-apple-darwin aarch64-pc-windows-msvc x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.native:build:unix: napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --platform --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds && napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --platform --release --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds && napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --platform --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-musl --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds && napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --platform --release --target aarch64-unknown-linux-musl --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds && napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --platform --release --target armv7-unknown-linux-gnueabihf --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds && napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --platform --release --target armv7-unknown-linux-musleabihf --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds && napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --platform --release --target x86_64-apple-darwin --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds && napi build --manifest-path ./native/Cargo.toml --release --target aarch64-apple-darwin --cross-compile -o ./prebuilds
scripts.native:build:all: npm run native:targets:add && npm run native:build:win && (npm run native:build:unix || echo Skipping unix cross targets)
